description: Enable time-of-day filter to cut Asian/off-hours trades. hour_cos is the 2nd most important feature (0.7311 SHAP) and its interaction with direction (0.1227) is the strongest pairwise signal. Decoding: hour_cos >= 0.63 maps to ~20:30-03:30 UTC (Asian/late-NY), where the weak filter shows shorts hit only 11.1% win rate (0.67x baseline). The time_of_day edge filter exists but is currently DISABLED for SSS. Enabling it with a London-open-through-mid-NY window removes the lowest-quality time zones while preserving the sessions where gold has structural liquidity and trending behavior.
expected_improvement: Removes ~25-30% of trades occurring in low-win-rate off-hours windows. Based on the weak filter evidence, these cut trades average 8-11% win rate vs 16.7% baseline. Remaining trades should see win rate lift to ~19-22%. Fewer trades but materially better expectancy.
